name: introspection
description: Build, evaluate, deploy, and improve vertical agents on Introspection.

interface.longDescription: Define quality, build focused recipes, create trustworthy evals, deploy through the Introspection CLI, and improve from production evidence or a chosen target.
defaultPrompt: Use $introspection:create for a new agent or $introspection:migrate for an existing agent, then prove the recipe locally.
Use $introspection:improve with an optional focus, or omit it to start from production evidence.
Use $introspection:deploy to publish and verify a proven recipe.
